title: DecisionOutput
description: Validated output contract of the Decision Layer. Every LLM response from the Decision layer must conform to this schema before being passed to the Action layer.

action.description: The single next action the agent will take

reasoning.description: One sentence explaining why this action was chosen

tool_name.description: MCP tool name to invoke. Set to 'web_search' for search_web action; 'fetch_url' or 'index_document' for crawl_page action; 'retrieve_context' or 'search_knowledge' for retrieve_context action; and null for other actions.

path.description: Path to document file to index

tool_args.description: Key-value arguments passed to the tool or action. For search_web: {'query': '...'}, for crawl_page: {'url': '...'} or {'path': '...'}, for retrieve_context: {'query': '...'} or {'query': '...', 'k': 5}, for save_memory: {'key': '...', 'value': '...'}, for final_answer/recall_memory: empty object {}

answer.description: Final answer text, only populated when action is final_answer

examples.reasoning: Query is about subterranean military silo communications which is a local project spec.
No context yet — need web data to answer the query.
Found a highly relevant URL — crawl for detailed content.
User explicitly asked to remember this fact.
All required information gathered — composing final answer.
